title: Wrova Reusable Large Plates Set of 8-11 INCH Plastic Plate Unbreakable Salad Plate Dishwasher & Microwave Safe Big Deep Plates for Kitchen - Colorful
features: 11-Inch Large Capacity: The Wrova lightweight 11-inch reusable large dinner plate is made of food-grade PP, BPA-free, and reusable. It measures 11 inches (27.9 cm) in width and 1.7 inches (4.3 cm) in height. It is available as an 8-piece set of large-capacity plates

Versatile Use: The Wrova large dinner plate has a large capacity and sufficient depth to hold large portions of food. It can be used to serve salads, pizzas, large servings of fruit, or even soupy dishes. Whether indoors or outdoors, our plate can demonstrate its excellent quality

Ideal Reusable Plates Option: This reusable dinner plate is an alternative to disposable dinnerware and can be used over and over again. Sturdy in daily use, this unbreakable plate shrugs off drops and bumps. Lightweight and Stack-able are advantages,they really suitable for kitchen and camping

Anti-slip Design: The Wrova 11-inch dinner plate is circular, featuring a minimalist and elegant design that suits various kitchen and dining room styles. It has an anti-slip design at the bottom to prevent slipping, ensuring a stable and secure dining experience

Dishwasher & Microwave Safe: Wrova large plastic plates for kitchen are Microwave safe and Dishwasher safe, temperature resistance ranges from -4°F to 248°F. Also available for Freezer. Easy to clean and store,our plates make your life more convenient

Wrova Large Plates: The 8-piece large plastic dinner plate set comes in a variety of different colors and is an excellent gift choice. Using these colorful plates at parties, dinners, or lunches not only adds fun to the meal but also creates a joyful atmosphere for the gathering
